text: In this synthetic in vitro assay, osimertinib inhibited mutant EGFR with an IC50 of 12 nM, whereas gefitinib inhibited the same target with an IC50 of 38 nM.
note: two inhibitors grounded to their declared target

text: This toy pharmacology record reports that salbutamol activated the beta-2 adrenergic receptor with an EC50 of 3.2 nM and a Ki of 1.1 nM.
EGFR activating variants are associated with response to tyrosine kinase inhibitors in non-small cell lung cancer.
note: negative control: the gene is activated by a variant, no drug subject to attribute an MoA to

text: TP53 mutation status is a broad marker of altered tumor suppressor biology.
note: negative control: 'suppressor' cue but no drug present

text: In this synthetic assay, osimertinib did not inhibit mutant EGFR at the tested concentrations.
note: adversarial negation: 'did not inhibit' must not yield an antagonist relation

text: In this synthetic cohort, secukinumab suppressed IL-17A activity in patient samples.
note: held-out paraphrase: antibody antagonist via 'suppress', not a corpus copy

text: Unlike vemurafenib, gefitinib inhibits EGFR in this synthetic comparison.
